steps.goal: Open Instagram. Observe the current screen state — are you on the home feed, login screen, or 2FA code screen? Just observe.

already_logged_in.description: The home feed is visible with posts/stories and bottom nav bar

on_login_screen.description: Username and password input fields are visible

on_2fa_screen.description: A security code / 2FA input field is visible

steps.goal: Enter username '{{username}}' and password '{{password}}', then tap 'Log In'.

on_2fa_screen.description: The 2FA security code screen appeared after login

steps.goal: Use get_totp with text '{{totpSecret}}' to generate a 6-digit code. Tap the security code input field to focus it, then use paste to paste the code. Tap Continue or Next or Confirm. If you see 'Waiting for approval' or 'Choose a way to confirm', tap 'Try another way', then select 'Authentication app', then tap Continue to get to the code entry screen, then do the get_totp + paste.
Dismiss any onboarding screens (Save Login Info, Notifications) by tapping 'Not Now' or 'Skip'. Navigate to the home feed.
Verify the home feed is visible.

on_home_feed.description: The Instagram home feed is visible with bottom navigation
